optional_inside_parallel.description: Optional singleton on one branch while another branch may interleave.

optional_singleton_parallel_branch.description: Optional singleton branch interleaves with one mandatory branch before a common join.

overlapping_optional_chain.description: Two overlapping optional activities between the same boundary.

singleton_optional_skip.description: One optional middle activity with direct shortcut evidence.

two_disjoint_optional_skips.description: Two non-overlapping optional singleton skips in sequence.
